title: FilterOrStepDocumentation
description: Structured documentation extracted from Okapi wiki pages. Complements the JSON Schema (which provides type, default, title, x-editor) with contextual help, behavioral details, and examples that cannot be introspected from code.

filterName.description: Human-readable name (e.g. 'HTML Filter', 'Search and Replace Step')

overview.description: 2-4 sentence markdown overview. What this filter/step does, what formats it handles, and its primary use case.

limitations.description: Known limitations. Each item is a concise markdown statement.

processingNotes.description: Important processing behaviors (encoding detection, BOM handling, memory usage, performance). Each item is a concise markdown statement.

description.description: Markdown explanation of what this example demonstrates

config.description: Configuration snippet as a markdown code block (```yaml or ```json). Null if not applicable.

input.description: Input content as a markdown code block. Null if not applicable.

output.description: Expected output as a markdown code block. Null if not applicable.

examples.description: Worked examples from the wiki showing configuration, input/output patterns

help.description: Contextual help text in markdown. Rendered beside the parameter editor in the UI. Should explain BEHAVIOR and USAGE — not repeat the title or type (those come from the schema). Use markdown formatting: `code`, **bold**, lists, code blocks.

values.description: Markdown description of valid values, ranges, or format requirements. For regex fields: syntax and examples. For paths: what file types are expected. For enums: what each choice means (only if not already in x-enumDescriptions). Null if the schema type and constraints are self-explanatory.

notes.description: Important warnings, caveats, or tips as markdown strings. Extracted from Note:/Warning:/Important: blocks in the wiki.

property.description: Schema property name this depends on

condition.description: Human-readable condition (e.g. 'must be true', 'overrides this when set')

dependsOn.description: Dependencies not captured by x-editor.enabledBy (which only handles simple enable/disable). Use for semantic dependencies: 'overrides', 'conflicts with', 'only meaningful when'.

examples.description: Short inline examples as markdown strings. For regex parameters: example patterns with explanations. For path parameters: example paths. Rendered as a compact list below the help text.

introducedIn.description: Okapi version where this parameter was introduced (e.g. 'M39', '1.48.0')

seeAlso.description: Wiki page fragment for deep-link (e.g. 'JSON_Filter#Extraction_Rules'). UI constructs full URL from wikiBaseUrl.

parameters.description: Per-parameter documentation keyed by the JSON Schema property name. For grouped properties, use dot-path (e.g. 'extraction.extractAll').
